# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/application",
    "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.0",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-curl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/logs') || mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/cache') || mkdir('storage/cache', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/sessions') || mkdir('storage/sessions', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/uploads') || mkdir('storage/uploads', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets') || mkdir('public/assets', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets/css') || mkdir('public/assets/css', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets/js') || mkdir('public/assets/js', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets/images') || mkdir('public/assets/images', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets/fonts') || mkdir('public/assets/fonts', 0755, true);\"",
            "chmod -R 775 storage",
            "chmod -R 775 bootstrap/cache",
            "@download-assets",
            "@setup-database",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@generate-keys",
            "@optimize-app"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/logs') || mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"is_dir('storage/cache') || mkdir('storage/cache', 0755, true);\"",
            "chmod -R 775 storage",
            "chmod -R 775 bootstrap/cache",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@optimize-app"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Downloading Bootstrap CSS...\\n'; $url = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'; $dest = 'public/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css'; file_put_contents($dest, file_get_contents($url));\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Downloading Bootstrap JS...\\n'; $url = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js'; $dest = 'public/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js'; file_put_contents($dest, file_get_contents($url));\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Downloading jQuery...\\n'; $url = 'https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js'; $dest = 'public/assets/js/jquery.min.js'; file_put_contents($dest, file_get_contents($url));\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Downloading Font Awesome CSS...\\n'; $url = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css'; $dest = 'public/assets/css/font-awesome.min.css'; file_put_contents($dest, file_get_contents($url));\"",
            "@php scripts/download-fonts.php"
        ],
        "setup-database": [
            "@php scripts/setup-database.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Database setup completed\\n';\""
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/minify-css.php",
            "@php scripts/minify-js.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Assets compiled successfully\\n';\""
        ],
        "generate-keys": [
            "@php scripts/generate-app-key.php",
            "@php scripts/generate-jwt-secret.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Security keys generated\\n';\""
        ],
        "optimize-app": [
            "@php scripts/optimize-autoload.php",
            "@php scripts/cache-config.php",
            "@php scripts/cache-routes.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Application optimized\\n';\""
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php",
            "@php -r \"array_map('unlink', glob('storage/cache/*.php'));\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Cache cleared\\n';\""
        ],
        "post-autoload-dump": [
            "@php scripts/post-autoload.php"
        ],
        "pre-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Starting installation...\\n';\""
        ],
        "pre-update-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Starting update...\\n';\""
        ],
        "setup": [
            "@composer install",
            "@post-install-cmd"
        ],
        "fresh": [
            "@clear-cache",
            "@setup-database",
            "@compile-assets"
        ],
        "build": [
            "@compile-assets",
            "@optimize-app"
        ],
        "deploy": [
            "git pull origin main",
            "@composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@optimize-app",
            "@php scripts/migrate-database.php",
            "@clear-cache"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "download-assets": "Download external assets from CDN URLs",
        "setup-database": "Initialize and configure database",
        "compile-assets": "Compile and minify CSS/JS assets",
        "generate-keys": "Generate application security keys",
        "optimize-app": "Optimize application performance",
        "clear-cache": "Clear all application caches",
        "setup": "Run complete application setup",
        "fresh": "Fresh installation with database setup",
        "build": "Build production assets",
        "deploy": "Deploy application to production"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        }
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
